problem id: 04d492a9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11010000 -> 10101101
  11011111 -> 10110011
  11011010 -> 10111001
  10010000 -> 00101001
  00101010 -> 01010110
  01001111 -> 10011010
  11000101 -> 10000110
  11001100 -> 10010100
  01011010 -> 10110001
  00100000 -> 01000010

query: 10011111
predicted answer: 00110111
